# Sample Project (sanitized fixture)

A tiny, generic project tree used by project-docs tests and documentation
examples. Everything here is synthetic — no real names, secrets, or paths.

- `docs/` — markdown documentation the scanner can discover
- `devlog/` — a development log entry
- `src/` — a Python module with docstrings (pointer-plan target)
- `logs/` — a sample sanitized test log
